highlights:
# Associate Software Engineer
...
Equinix is the world’s digital infrastructure company®, enabling innovations that enrich work, life, and the planet. The Associate Software Engineer role focuses on supporting the development, deployment, and operation of AI and ML-powered systems within a cloud-native environment, contributing to software engineering and lifecycle management.

validate fixes and improvements

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience)
- 0–3 years of professional experience
- Proficiency in Python
- Familiarity with at least one major cloud provider (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Strong working knowledge of SQL
- Experience with LLM prompt engineering
- Understanding of CI/CD and infrastructure automation concepts
- Experience with version control and collaborative development practices
- Experience working with MCP servers
- Experience building Agent‑to‑Agent workflows
- Exposure to deploying or operating LLMs in development or production settings
- Familiarity with ML Ops practices such as model versioning, monitoring, and reproducibility
- Experience with Kafka or event‑driven architectures
- Knowledge of observability and reliability best practices
- Internship, academic, or project experience operating AI systems at scale

results.title: Senior Data Engineer - GCP | Wfh
highlights: is the world's digital infrastructure company®, shortening the path to connectivity to enable the innovations that enrich our work, life and planet.A place where bold ideas are welcomed, human connection is valued, and everyone has the opportunity to shape their future.Help us challenge assumptions, uncover bias, and remove barriers-because progress starts with fresh ideas. You'll find belonging, purpose, and a team that welcomes you-because when you feel valued, you're empowered to do your best work.Job SummaryAs a Senior Data Engineer at Equinix, you will be responsible for driving end-to-end delivery of enterprise-scale data solutions on Google Cloud Platform. This role combines hands-on technical expertise, requiring you to design sophisticated system architectures, lead cross-functional teams, and mentor Staff and other data engineers. You will be responsible for solution design and ensuring the successful delivery of mission-critical data products. The ideal candidate demonstrates exceptional technical depth in GCP data technologies, proven leadership in guiding engineering teams through complex challenges, and the ability to translate strategic business objectives into scalable, innovative technical solutions. Knowledge of AI, Machine Learning Operations, and emerging technologies like Agentic AI and Model Context Protocol (MCP) is highly valued.ResponsibilitiesSystem Design & Architecture Data Scientist with a PhD in Mechanical Engineering. All things related to computational modeling and data analytics are of great interest to me. Critical thinking is one skill that I train on and apply the most in everyday work. Currently solving business problems with Data analysis, Statistical Modeling, and Machine learning. Career summary: ● 6+ years of technical experience in material modeling and simulation. ● Experienced in modeling a wide range of engineering materials such as 2D thin films, metallic systems, polymer, and composites using finite element, continuum mechanics, and molecular dynamics. ● 2 years experience in designing and conducting hands-on mechanical and thermal experiments, in-situ microscopy to explore nanomaterials based polymer materials. Some of my designed experiment methodologies led to many subsequent scientific publications. ● Selected projects on computer vision tasks using deep learning: Object detection, Image segmentation, Face recognition system, Sign language digits recognition. ● NLP projects: Character level language model, trigger word detection system, named-entity recognition. ● 6+ years of laboratory experience in developing and validating research hypotheses, maintaining deadlines, writing research papers, and presenting in numerous regional and international conferences. ● Programming Skills: Python, SQL, MATLAB, Bash, Fortran, VBA ● Physics Based Simulation: ABAQUS, ANSYS, LAMMPS, SOLIDOWRKS ●Python Libraries Frequently Used: NumPy, Pandas, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Streamlit, Plotly

results.title: Avinash Avi
highlights:
Gen AI Security Engineer at [Equinix](https://www.linkedin.com/company/equinix)
...
As a Gen AI Security Engineer at Equinix, I focus on enhancing the security of GenAI pipelines through implementing robust controls, validating model input/output, and mitigating risks such as adversarial prompts and model inversion attacks. I collaborate with ML teams to integrate security-by-design into the AI/ML lifecycle and ensure compliance with privacy regulations, including GDPR and NIST AI RMF. Pursed Master of Science in Computer Science at Trine University, I am dedicated to advancing my knowledge in cybersecurity and AI governance. My goal is to develop innovative strategies to address emerging security challenges while contributing to organizational objectives.
...
### Gen AI Security Engineer at [Equinix](https://www.linkedin.com/company/equinix) (Current)
...
Implemented security controls for GenAI pipelines, including model input/output validation, prompt injection defense, and data sanitization. Integrated monitoring and logging to detect anomalies in GenAI behavior and prevent misuse or data leakage. Conducted threat modeling and risk assessments for LLM-based applications, addressing adversarial prompts and model inversion attacks. Ensured compliance with AI governance frameworks and privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, NIST AI RMF). Secured API endpoints and model access using OAuth2, API gateways, and rate limiting strategies. Collaborated with ML teams to embed security-by-design into AI/ML lifecycle stages (training, inference, deployment).

results.title: Equinix Data Scientist Interview Questions & Guide 2026
highlights:
As a **Data Scientist** at **Equinix**, you will work at the intersection of massive global infrastructure and cutting-edge machine learning. **Equinix** is the world's digital infrastructure company, operating hundreds of International Business Exchange (IBX) data centers across the globe. In this role, your work directly influences how global enterprise data is routed, secured, and optimized. The sheer scale of the network traffic, power consumption, and hardware metrics generated by **Equinix** infrastructure presents complex data challenges that you will be tasked with solving.
...
Your models and insights will drive critical business decisions, predictive maintenance schedules, and energy efficiency initiatives. Whether you are optimizing cooling systems in a massive facility, predicting customer churn, or building natural language processing tools to streamline global operations, your contributions will have a tangible impact on the reliability of the global internet. This makes the **Data Scientist** position both highly prestigious and intellectually demanding.
...
The role requires a unique blend of theoretical machine learning expertise and practical systems thinking. You will not just build models in isolation; you will deploy them into production environments where they must perform reliably under real-world constraints. Candidates who thrive here are those who enjoy working with complex, messy physical and digital datasets and translating them into elegant, scalable algorithmic solutions.

results.title: Equinix and Cisco Build the Infrastructure for Secure, Sovereign AI Access in Singapore
highlights:
## Equinix and Cisco Build the Infrastructure for Secure, Sovereign AI Access in Singapore
...
SINGAPORE, June 17, 2026 — Equinix, Inc.(Nasdaq: EQIX), the world’s digital infrastructure company®, today announced an expanded collaboration with Cisco to accelerate AI innovation in Singapore. Organizations can deploy Cisco Secure AI Factory with NVIDIA, a full-stack, validated architecture designed to simplify and secure AI deployments, directly within Equinix’s Singapore data centers. The Secure AI Factory now brings AI power to edge, including retail stores, hospitals, warehouses with Cisco Unified Edge, an AI-ready edge infrastructure solution. Together, Cisco and Equinix aim to provide a secure foundation to launch and scale AI projects.
...
To bridge this gap, Equinix and Cisco offer an end-to-end architecture that scales workloads while maintaining strict data governance and sovereignty. By leveraging Equinix’s interconnected ecosystem, organizations can work with over 2,000 technology companies to test configurations, understand connectivity requirements, and assess how AI deployments can be supported across data centers, cloud, and edge locations.
...
“Singapore continues to place the digital economy at the heart of its national growth strategy, investing in digital infrastructure, AI, quantum computing, connectivity and talent to strengthen its position as a leading digital innovation hub,” said Yee May Leong, Managing Director, Singapore, Equinix. “As AI becomes more embedded in business strategies, organizations need to connect to their ecosystems, make informed decisions, and scale with confidence. Through our expanded collaboration with Cisco, we will help organizations extend their AI infrastructure from centralized data centers to distributed environments while keeping operational complexity in check.”
...
Available for deployment within Equinix’s data centers, Cisco’s Secure AI Factory with NVIDIA provides a reliable, secure foundation for the agentic era. Businesses can leverage this to:
...
- Run AI securely anywhere: Process data in private, high-performance environments quickly, in the data center or network edge.
- Keep data protected: Benefit from built-in security, observability, and zero-trust at every layer of the AI stack.
- Simplify operations: Manage AI projects with consistent performance using fleet management techniques, reducing data retrieval times from minutes to seconds for real-time decision-making up to the AI edge.
...
“Organizations scaling their AI ambitions need a foundation that is simple, secure, and scalable,” said Bee Kheng Tay, President, ASEAN, Cisco. “Our collaboration with Equinix simplifies how customers build their AI infrastructures so they can focus on driving business value and innovation.”
...
This initiative supports Singapore’s National AI Missions by providing the secure, edge-ready infrastructure required to scale AI transformation across critical sectors like finance and manufacturing, establishing the critical infrastructure needed to power the nation’s AI-driven economy.
...
- Equinix Unveils Distributed AI Infrastructure to Help Businesses Accelerate the Next Wave of AI Innovation [Press Release]
- Cisco Secure AI Factory with NVIDIA Makes AI Easier to Deploy and Secure, Anywhere Organizations Need It [Press Release]
- Distributed AI Infrastructure: Accelerating Innovation at Scale [Blog]
- Cisco Secure AI Factory: Powering Agentic AI at Scale [Blog]
...
About Equinix Equinix(Nasdaq: EQIX) shortens the path to boundless connectivity anywhere in the world. Its digital infrastructure, data center footprint and interconnected ecosystems empower innovations that enhance our work, life and planet. Equinix connects economies, countries, organizations and communities, delivering seamless digital experiences and cutting-edge AI—quickly, efficiently and everywhere.

results.title: Parthiban Ponnusamy
highlights:
Lead Platform Systems Engineer at [Equinix](https://www.linkedin.com/company/equinix)
...
I build platforms that engineers build on top of. Over 20 years, I've worked across every layer of the infrastructure stack — from racking servers in datacenters and configuring RAID arrays, to designing multi-agent AI systems that handle infrastructure provisioning through natural language. That full-stack depth isn't accidental. It's what lets me make architectural decisions that hold up in production, not just in architecture diagrams. In my current role leading Platform Engineering, I've built an Internal Developer Platform from scratch — collapsing a 4–7 day manual application onboarding process into a 15–20 minute self-service workflow. I designed a YAML-first IaC framework on Terragrunt with 100% IaC compliance, daily drift detection, and per-resource isolated state for minimal blast radius. I architected a JSON-config-driven CI/CD framework with 40+ GitHub Actions reusable workflows covering every deployment type our data engineering teams use — all self-serviceable without platform team involvement. The piece I'm most excited about: a production multi-agent AI system built with LangGraph and LangChain — a supervisor-routed system with specialized agents handling GCP infrastructure provisioning, application onboarding, platform knowledge (RAG on Confluence and GitHub), environment refresh, and approval/ticketing workflows. Developers chat with the platform. The agents handle everything from Jira ticket creation to Terraform apply to repo commit. I've also driven GCP cost optimization program — not just cost reports, but policy-as-code enforcement, automated budget breach response, committed use negotiation, and ephemeral infrastructure patterns. What I care about most: eliminating toil at the source. Not automating individual tasks, but building systems that make entire categories of manual work disappear. What I work with: LangGraph • LangChain • Google ADK • MCP • RAG • Generative AI • Python • FastAPI • Linux • Kubernetes • Terraform • Terragrunt • ArgoCD • GitOps • GitHub Actions • GCP • Python • DevOps • CI/CD • FinOps • Internal Developer Platforms • Platform Engineering • SRE Always open to conversations about platform engineering, agentic AI systems, and developer experience. Feel free to connect.
...

# Machine Learning Scientist III
...
Employer Expedia Group Location Bangalore, India Salary Competitive Closing date 30 Jul 2026
...
Sector Data Science, Science and Pharmaceutical Role Professional Contract Type Permanent Hours Full Time
...
## Job Details
...
At Expedia Group, we help travelers explore the world, one journey at a time. As a global travel company powered by passionate people, trusted partnerships, and leading technology, we connect travelers, partners, and advertisers through our consumer brands, B2B network, and travel advertising business.Here, you'll do meaningful work that helps millions of people discover, book, and experience travel with more ease, confidence, and joy. Our five Behaviors-Traveler First, Think Big, Operate with Excellence, Ownership Mindset, and Succeed Together-help foster a supportive environment where people can grow their careers and have the flexibility, benefits, and support to do their best work. Join us and build for travelers everywhere.Introduction to teamWe create and deliver tailored marketing strategies for Expedia Group`s brands, focusing on establishing strong connections and cohesive experiences for travelers and partners. We leverage our functional expertise and creative excellence to build trust and loyalty for our brands through innovative marketing approaches and technology.Are you passionate about using Machine Learning (ML) and Natural Language Processing techniques to enhance the Traveler Experience? Our Marketing Content Machine Learning Science team focuses on generating and optimizing content that delivers relevant, personalized experiences to travelers and drives value for our business.If you're ready for your next challenge and want to innovate in a forward-thinking and cutting-edge team, we want to speak with you!We are looking for a self-motivated and independent individual who will have end to end ownership over driving impact to Expedia`s largest Marketing channels. With ample access to the latest technology this could be an exciting position for someone who loves to explore and deeply understand applications of machine learning!In this role, you will:
...
- Develop and implement advanced machine learning models (including Large Language Models) and statistical algorithms, processing massive datasets to build scalable prototypes.
- Explore new content opportunities in text and image domains to create personalized traveler experiences with high business impact.
- Design and run experiments (A/B testing, multi-variate, factorial design, stratified sampling) to measure the effectiveness of campaigns and new initiatives.
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including Machine Learning Science, Marketing, and Engineering, and present findings to executives and stakeholders to drive strategic decisions.
- Contribute to the success of Expedia's ML community by mentoring team members, fostering a collaborative culture, and sharing best practices with other ML teams.
...
Experience and Qualifications:
...
- Master`s Degree or PhD preferred in a related field, or equivalent related professional experience
- Proficient in one or more data science programming languages (Python, Java, R).
- Proven experience applying NLP techniques and LLMs in production to solve business problems and generate significant value.
- Strong expertise in ML techniques such as Bayesian Methods, Clustering, Decision Trees, Latent Dirichlet Allocation, NER, Random Forests, and more.
- Accustomed to collaborative, fun work environments.

- Data Science & ML
- Strong expertise in Machine Learning & Statistical Modeling
- Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn)
- Feature engineering, model evaluation, and tuning

- Generative AI
- LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, LLaMA, etc.)
- Prompt engineering and LLM orchestration
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- LangChain / LlamaIndex / Hugging Face

- Data & Processing
- SQL
- Large-scale data handling and transformation

- Cloud & MLOps
- AWS / Azure / GCP
- MLflow / SageMaker / Azure ML
- CI/CD for ML pipelines
- Model deployment and monitoring

- Preferred Qualifications
- Experience with Deep Learning (TensorFlow / PyTorch)
- Exposure to vector databases (Pinecone, FAISS, Chroma)
- Experience with Databricks or big data platforms
- Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
...
- W2 Full-Time Only
- No C2C

results.title: Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
highlights:
Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
...
# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.
...
- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures
